one_time_description: Trans Mountain funding of $3,100,000 received in fiscal 2020 (not in prior year)
economic_notes: SXDLP (Sema:th Xot:sa Developments Limited Partnership) owns 51% of Kilgard Business Park Limited Partnership (KBPLP) established October 2019. SXDLP owns 82.99% of Sth'oqi Aquaculture Limited Partnership (SALP). Head lease of $3,907,500 contributed to SXDLP for land development. First Nation receives 61% of revenue from ISC funding arrangement. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent risk.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Auditor Manning Elliott LLP based in Abbotsford BC. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: SXDLP (99.99% owned) and SALP (82.99% via SXDLP). Three incorporated subsidiaries (Sumas Clay Products Ltd 100%, SFN Renewable Energy Ltd 100%, Sema:th Xot:sa Developments Ltd 100%) recorded at modified equity at nominal value $1 each as inactive or general partner entities. Settlement Trust (Upper Sumas IR6 Right-of-Way Settlement Trust) consolidated. $663,419 in trust funds for minors excluded from financial statements. Non-cash investing activity: head lease contribution to SXDLP for $3,907,500 in exchange for partnership units. COVID-19 risk noted. Balance sheet detail not fully extractable from provided text; current liabilities and deferred revenue set to 0 as not found in provided excerpt.
